title: kill.jar
description: A horror mod that is based off The Broken Script
body:
![kill.jar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58d98620d913c3b4474212a8b0f42ca3f5b8335c.png)
# **MUST READ BEFORE DOWNLOADING:**
This is a horror mod that is based of the [Broken Script](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script)! So this game contains random jumpscares and loud noises. This game will also corrupt your world! This game is in early development, it may have some bugs and more stuff. Also this is a mod I made for fun so don't expect it to be the best mod you ever played that has the same quality as the Broken Script. Also this is a very SLOW MOD so it may take a little while before the mod fully kicks in. (Also it's a 20% chance when you use a bed a night it will explode so beware)

# NEED TO WORK:
- 1.21.1 NeoForge
- No Multiplayer

# **CONTENT IN MOD:**
 - 24 random events
 - 6 Entity's
 - 2 Fake mobs
 - 1 Dimension
 
#  **CREDITS:**
 - Edan: Game coder, Entity Designer, Logo Designer
 - Eliah: Entity Designer
 - Liam: Entity Designer

#  **OTHER PLATFORMS:**
[Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/mod/kill-jar/)
